steps.title: Find the contrast goal
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between the two sculptures. The relevant contrast is that De Haan's neon work spells out a phrase, while Kawauchi's neon work forms an abstract squiggle.

steps.title: Reject similarity statements
steps.content: Choice A says both works are sculptures. Choice B says both are made from neon lighting. Choice C says both artists have used neon. Each highlights a similarity instead of the requested difference. The effective response directly contrasts the phrase-based work with the abstract squiggle. The answer is D.
